name: A Shattered, Colorless Realm
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>識</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>辺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>世</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: A Broken World of Infinite Consciousness
desc: If "Vicious Astraloud" is on the field: Target 1 card on the field; destroy it, then, if the destroyed card's original name was "Vicious Astraloud", you can Special Summon 1 of your banished "Visas Starfrost", or if it was not, you can make 1 "Vicious Astraloud" you control gain 1500 ATK.
eff: If "Vicious Astraloud" is on the field: Target 1 card on the field; destroy it, then, if the destroyed card's original name was "Vicious Astraloud", you can Special Summon 1 of your banished "Visas Starfrost", or if it was not, you can make 1 "Vicious Astraloud" you control gain 1500 ATK.
